Andrew Huberman, PhD, is a Professor of Neurobiology at Stanford University School of Medicine and host of Huberman Lab. Episode 53 "The Science of Making & Breaking Habits" is an official Huberman Lab production available at hubermanlab.com. The limbic friction concept and no- compensation principle ("the next day, you just get right back on the horse") and procedural memory visualization for habit re-entry ("if you are somebody who used to perform a habit") were verified from the official hubermanlab.com episode page and confirmed via the episode notes page content fetched directly.
